name: projection_filter
sql: SELECT id, value FROM axon_table WHERE category = 'B' ORDER BY id

name: aggregate_sum
sql: SELECT SUM(value) AS total_value FROM axon_table

name: group_by_category
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM axon_table GROUP BY category ORDER BY category

name: order_limit
sql: SELECT id FROM axon_table ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 2

name: count_all_rows
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM axon_table

name: sum_ids
sql: SELECT SUM(id) AS total_id FROM axon_table

name: min_max_value
sql: SELECT MIN(value) AS min_value, MAX(value) AS max_value FROM axon_table

name: distinct_categories
sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM axon_table ORDER BY category

name: cte_grouped_sum
sql: WITH base AS (SELECT category, value FROM axon_table) SELECT category, SUM(value) AS total_value FROM base GROUP BY category ORDER BY category

name: derived_table_high_value_count
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS high_value_rows FROM (SELECT id, value FROM axon_table WHERE value >= 20) filtered

name: having_grouped_sum
sql: SELECT category, SUM(value) AS total_value FROM axon_table GROUP BY category HAVING SUM(value) >= 60 ORDER BY category

name: case_aggregate
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'A' THEN value ELSE 0 END) AS a_value_total FROM axon_table
